mapper.insert: INSERT INTO backtest_records (stock_code, stock_name, strategy_name, start_date, end_date, initial_capital, final_capital, total_return_pct, annual_return_pct, max_drawdown_pct, sharpe_ratio, win_rate_pct, total_trades, winning_trades, losing_trades, avg_holding_days, profit_loss_ratio, benchmark_return_pct, alpha_pct, trade_details, parameters, signal_id, market_phase, market_phase_summary, action, direction_expected, actual_movement, outcome, eval_status, eval_window_days, return_pct, analysis_date, diagnostics, created_at) VALUES (#{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{strategyName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{initialCapital}, #{finalCapital}, #{totalReturnPct}, #{annualReturnPct}, #{maxDrawdownPct}, #{sharpeRatio}, #{winRatePct}, #{totalTrades}, #{winningTrades}, #{losingTrades}, #{avgHoldingDays}, #{profitLossRatio}, #{benchmarkReturnPct}, #{alphaPct}, #{tradeDetails}, #{parameters}, #{signalId}, #{marketPhase}, #{marketPhaseSummary}, #{action}, #{directionExpected}, #{actualMovement}, #{outcome}, #{evalStatus}, #{evalWindowDays}, #{returnPct}, #{analysisDate}, #{diagnostics}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE backtest_records SET stock_code=#{stockCode}, stock_name=#{stockName}, strategy_name=#{strategyName}, start_date=#{startDate}, end_date=#{endDate}, initial_capital=#{initialCapital}, final_capital=#{finalCapital}, total_return_pct=#{totalReturnPct}, annual_return_pct=#{annualReturnPct}, max_drawdown_pct=#{maxDrawdownPct}, sharpe_ratio=#{sharpeRatio}, win_rate_pct=#{winRatePct}, total_trades=#{totalTrades}, winning_trades=#{winningTrades}, losing_trades=#{losingTrades}, avg_holding_days=#{avgHoldingDays}, profit_loss_ratio=#{profitLossRatio}, benchmark_return_pct=#{benchmarkReturnPct}, alpha_pct=#{alphaPct}, trade_details=#{tradeDetails}, parameters=#{parameters}, signal_id=#{signalId}, market_phase=#{marketPhase}, market_phase_summary=#{marketPhaseSummary}, action=#{action}, direction_expected=#{directionExpected}, actual_movement=#{actualMovement}, outcome=#{outcome}, eval_status=#{evalStatus}, eval_window_days=#{evalWindowDays}, return_pct=#{returnPct}, analysis_date=#{analysisDate}, diagnostics=#{diagnostics} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM backtest_records WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM backtest_records WHERE strategy_name = #{strategyName} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM backtest_records ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
